headline: Regulatory capture: 8 agency heads came from industries they regulate
context: Eight federal regulatory agency heads appointed in 2024-2025 previously held senior positions in the industries their agencies are mandated to regulate.

cards.big: 8 regulatory chiefs came directly from the industries they now regulate
cards.sub: Revolving door between regulated industries and their regulators spins openly

cards.big: No federal law imposes cooling-off periods between industry and regulatory roles
cards.sub: Officials move from corporate boardrooms to regulatory offices without restriction

cards.big: Telecommunications regulator ex-CEO previously earned RM2.8 million from a regulated telco
cards.sub: Financial ties to regulated entities create unavoidable conflicts of interest

cards.big: Energy Commission, MCMC, and Bank Negara all had industry-origin appointments since 2024
cards.sub: Pattern spans multiple sectors — this is systemic, not isolated

cards.big: Industry experience is an asset — but when the fox designs henhouse security, expect problems
Should regulators be barred from appointing anyone from the regulated industry within 5 years?
